# Kurtz Auto Detailing

> Premium mobile auto detailing based in Navasota, TX, serving the Bryan-College Station area and the entire Brazos Valley. Founded in May 2024 by Israel Yanez. 300+ details completed. 100+ five-star reviews. We use professional-grade Gyeon and Koch-Chemie products exclusively.

## Services & Pricing

- Standard Detail: Starting at $240 — full interior and exterior detail
- Full Detail: Starting at $310 — comprehensive interior and exterior with engine bay
- Luxury Detail: Starting at $469.99 — white-glove treatment for high-end vehicles
- Interior Deep Clean: Starting at $370 — deep extraction, steam cleaning, odor removal
- Clay Wash & Seal: Starting at $159.99 — decontamination wash with paint sealant
- Ceramic Coatings: Starting at $749.99 — Gyeon professional ceramic coating (2-5+ year protection)
- Paint Correction: Starting at $397.97 — swirl mark and scratch removal
- Million Dollar Package: Starting at $2,400 — the ultimate detail (interior, exterior, paint correction, ceramic coating, engine bay)

## About

Kurtz Auto Detailing was founded by Israel Yanez in May 2024 in Navasota, TX. What started as a side job detailing cars for friends and family grew into a full-time mobile detailing business. Every job is handled personally by Israel — no subcontractors, no employees. With 300+ details completed and 100+ five-star reviews, Kurtz Auto Detailing is the highest-rated mobile detailer in the Bryan-College Station area. We use professional-grade Gyeon and Koch-Chemie products on every vehicle. We are a fully mobile service — we come to your home, office, or wherever your vehicle is.
